sections.paragraph:
ἔκπληκτος, ον shocking, frightful in act. sense (s. πλήσσω and next entry; so Hero I, 338, 5; 342, 4; Lucian, Herm. 18; Orph. Hymn. 39, 10) βουλή (w. πονηρά) Hv 1, 2, 4.—S. DELG s.v. πλήσσω.

act. act. = active

Lucian Lucian , II a.d.—List 5

Orph. Orph. = Orphica, var. dates—List 5

Hv Hv = Visions

DELG DELG = PChantraine, Dictionnaire étymologique de la langue grecque—List 6

s.v. s.v. = sub voce (under the word, look up the word)

Arndt, William ; Danker, Frederick W. ; Bauer, Walter: A Greek-English Lexicon of the New Testament and Other Early Christian Literature. 3rd ed. Chicago : University of Chicago Press, 2000, S. 308
